name: census-bubble
description: Bubble chart of income vs poverty rate from 300 county records
messages: Create a bubble chart showing median income vs poverty rate, with bubble size representing population and color representing state
rubric: Must use dot mark with x=median_income (or poverty_rate), y=poverty_rate (or median_income), r=population, fill=state. 300 data points with 8 states in legend. Color legend required.
